title: iris collettii var. collettii
intro: Iris collettii var. collettii, also known as the Blue Australian Flag or Blue Flag of Australia, is a plant species belonging to the iris family, characterized by its distinctive blue flowers. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever reduction, wound healing, and even skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of Iris collettii var. collettii often involve the use of its rhizomes or roots, which can be dried, powdered, and combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, or poultices for topical application.
